verification_gate: Every preserved capability maps to exactly one LifeOS bounded context and contract; dependency cycles, duplicate owners, anti-corruption seams, and migration order are explicit.

clause_every_preserved_capability_maps_t.worktrees_are_not_independent_owners: the 9 worktree-transient peers inherit their parent's bounded context and are reconciled per PRESERVE-003 (merge or archive) — never adopted as independent capabilities or second owners
clause_every_preserved_capability_maps_t.host_is_receiver_not_peer_capability: lifeos is the consolidation TARGET (BC-UI-PRESENTATION host sink), enumerated but not counted among the merged peer capabilities

clause_dependency_cycles_explicit.edge_semantics: from->to = 'from' depends on / consumes contract of 'to' (customer -> supplier)
clause_dependency_cycles_explicit.cycle_check_method: Kahn topological sort; acyclic iff all 15 nodes emitted

seams: ACL-01 BC-INGEST: redb transitional durable blobstore -> BlobStore SHA-256 verified cutover (STORE-001)
ACL-02 BC-PERSIST: RuVector native PostgreSQL extension (No Sidecar)
ACL-03 BC-ORCHESTRATION: ruflo Node runtime -> subprocess/IPC adapter
ACL-04 BC-COGNITION: hermes-agent node+python -> message-bus adapter
ACL-05 BC-INTEGRITY: Claude Code PreToolUse hook -> typed policy verdict (policy seam)
ACL-06 BC-COMPUTE: CUDA driver FFI -> safe GpuComputeSeam trait
ACL-07 BC-FOUNDATION: yazelix-helix MPL-2.0 -> license + process boundary
ACL-08 BC-SECRET: external secret provisioning -> references only, never raw secrets
ACL-09 BC-BRIDGE: envctl remote libSQL -> subordinate to PostgreSQL (deferred to STORE-001)
ACL-10 BC-CONTROL-PLANE: meta subprocess plugins -> MessagePack protocol boundary
ACL-11 BC-GOVERNANCE: beads SQLite/JSONL -> subordinate repository adapter
ACL-12 BC-EVIDENCE: notebooklm-py Python -> process-boundary CLI wrapper
clause_anti_corruption_seams_explicit.policy_seam_identified: ACL-05 (agent guard PreToolUse denial) is the explicit policy seam owned by BC-INTEGRITY

waves: wave-0-data-spine: BC-PERSIST/BC-INGEST/BC-BRIDGE/BC-SECRET (meta-ruvector, nu_plugin, envctl, vault_hub) under STORE-001 verified-cutover
wave-1-cognition-compute: BC-COMPUTE/BC-COGNITION (cuda-oxide, meta-hardware, harness-agent-rs, hermes-agent, harness_hub)
wave-2-orchestration-governance: BC-INTEGRITY/BC-ORCHESTRATION/BC-GOVERNANCE (agent, rusty-idd, ruflo, teri, flexnetos_runner, beads_rust, handoff, prompt_hub)
wave-3-foundation-control: BC-FOUNDATION/BC-CONTROL-PLANE/BC-EVIDENCE (yazelix x4, weave, loop_lib, meta_plugin_protocol, meta-plugins, grit, icm, notebooklm-py)
wave-4-presentation-devex: BC-UI-PRESENTATION/BC-DEVEX/BC-HOME-NETWORK (lifeos host, ccboard, rtk-tokenkill, beads_viewer, network-control)
wave-5-reconcile: 9 worktrees merged/archived to parents per PRESERVE-003
clause_migration_order_explicit.order_respects_topological_order: suppliers land before consumers; data spine first

store_001_alignment.note: BC-PERSIST, BC-INGEST, BC-BRIDGE, BC-COGNITION, BC-SECRET reproduce STORE-001's 6 state-class assignments (PERSIST owns 2); all other 10 contexts own no durable macro-state and reference BC-PERSIST — preserving single durable writer, forward-only sync, verified cutover, and No-Sidecar.

proof_summary: CONSOLIDATE-001 defines the LifeOS single-application Rust target as 15 bounded contexts, each with stable published contracts and canonical data ownership drawn from the Architecture Blueprint layers and STORE-001's state-class model. generated/capability_merge_matrix.json maps every one of the 42 PRESERVE-002 peers to exactly one destination: 32 independent peer capabilities each land in exactly one bounded context and contract (nu_plugin->BC-INGEST/BlobStore, meta-ruvector->BC-PERSIST/HybridSearch, envctl->BC-BRIDGE/ForwardBridge, harness-agent-rs/hermes-agent/harness_hub->BC-COGNITION/AgentRuntime, ruflo/teri/flexnetos_runner->BC-ORCHESTRATION, agent/rusty-idd->BC-INTEGRITY, beads_rust/handoff/prompt_hub->BC-GOVERNANCE, notebooklm-py->BC-EVIDENCE, loop_lib/meta_plugin_protocol/meta-plugins/grit/icm->BC-CONTROL-PLANE, yazelix stack + weave->BC-FOUNDATION, cuda-oxide/meta-hardware->BC-COMPUTE, network-control->BC-HOME-NETWORK, ccboard/rtk-tokenkill/beads_viewer->BC-DEVEX, vault_hub->BC-SECRET); the lifeos peer is the BC-UI-PRESENTATION host that RECEIVES capabilities (not a merged capability); and the 9 transient worktrees inherit their parent's context and reconcile per PRESERVE-003 rather than becoming second owners. The context map is proven acyclic by Kahn topological sort over the depends-on-contract edges (15/15 nodes emitted; suppliers-first order recorded). A single-owner ledger binds each of STORE-001's six durable state classes to exactly one context, upholding the single-durable-writer invariant and confirming zero duplicate owners, zero ownerless capabilities, and zero dropped capabilities. Twelve anti-corruption seams (ACL-01..ACL-12) wrap every foreign model/runtime, including the explicit policy seam (ACL-05, Claude Code agent guard) and the redb->PostgreSQL transitional-blobstore seam (ACL-01) gated on STORE-001's verified SHA-256 parity cutover. Migration order is a six-wave plan (data spine -> compute/cognition -> integrity/orchestration/governance -> foundation/control/evidence -> presentation/devex/home -> worktree reconciliation) that respects the topological order and STORE-001's verified-cutover rule. This is a definition artifact only: no product code, database, or live data was created (product_execution_performed=false); no peer source was mutated.

live_commands.purpose: Generate + self-validate the capability merge matrix (every peer mapped exactly once; context map acyclic; no duplicate owner)
live_commands.command: python3 gen_matrix.py (asserts 32+9+1==42, every peer once, Kahn acyclic, disjoint state-class owners)
output: coverage: peer_count_total=42 independent=32 worktrees=9 host=1 sum_equals_total=true every_independent_capability_mapped_exactly_once=true no_duplicate_owner=true bounded_context_count=15 anti_corruption_seam_count=12 context_map_acyclic=true

topo: BC-COMPUTE BC-EVIDENCE BC-INGEST BC-PERSIST BC-COGNITION BC-HOME-NETWORK BC-INTEGRITY BC-ORCHESTRATION BC-SECRET BC-BRIDGE BC-FOUNDATION BC-CONTROL-PLANE BC-GOVERNANCE BC-DEVEX BC-UI-PRESENTATION

store_001_alignment: Data-owning contexts reproduce STORE-001 state-class assignments exactly; single durable writer preserved; redb-durable classes migrate to PostgreSQL only via verified BlobStore SHA-256 parity cutover.
